mnemonics: Just JENKINS: Joint, Estimation, Non-stationary, Knowledge, Identification, Novelty, Systems
keyPoints: Co-developed the Box-Jenkins methodology for ARIMA modeling
Emphasized a systematic, iterative approach to model identification, estimation, and diagnostics
Pioneered the application of time series analysis to complex, real-world systems
commonMistakes: Assuming ARIMA models are the only valid approach (they are a specific, powerful methodology)
Forgetting the importance of the model diagnostic-checking step in the Box-Jenkins approach
Applying ARIMA models to non-stationary data without proper differencing first
